text:
- Update to 2.0.11
- Add dependency for deskutils/send2trash
- Trim new Uses
- Trim Desktop entry file
- Update WWW
 Trim pkg-plist


For games/anki-2.0.11 is needed

ports/179604 [NEW PORT] deskutils/send2trash: Small package that sends files to the Trash
